allow: PowerShell(cd "d:\\Programs\\_ProgramExamples\\Example_Programs\\GithubProjects\\BasicsOfCodingWASMWithwasmtk"; $failures = @\(\); Get-ChildItem -Directory | Where-Object { $_.Name -match '^\\d{2}_' } | Sort-Object Name | ForEach-Object { $dir = $_.FullName; $stem = $_.Name -replace '^\\d{2}_', ''; $ts = Join-Path $dir "$stem.ts"; if \(Test-Path $ts\) { Write-Host "Compiling $\($_.Name\)/$stem.ts ..."; Push-Location $dir; $out = wasmtk wasic "$stem.ts" 2>&1; $code = $LASTEXITCODE; Pop-Location; if \($code -ne 0\) { $failures += "$\($_.Name\): $out"; Write-Host "  FAILED: $out" } else { Write-Host "  OK" } } else { Write-Host "  SKIP \(no $stem.ts\)" } }; if \($failures.Count -gt 0\) { Write-Host "`nFAILED:"; $failures | ForEach-Object { Write-Host "  $_" } } else { Write-Host "`nAll lessons compiled successfully." })
